478.dx-icon {
479 background-position: 50% 50%;
480}
481.dx-svg-icon {
482 pointer-events: none;
483}
484.dx-color-scheme {
485 font-family: "#";
486}
487.dx-widget {
488 display: block;
489 -ms-content-zooming: none;
490 -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
491 -webkit-text-size-adjust: none;
492 -webkit-touch-callout: none;
493 padding: 0;
494 outline: 0;
495 -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact;
496 color-adjust: exact;
497}
498.dx-widget,
499.dx-widget:before,
500.dx-widget:after,
501.dx-widget *,
502.dx-widget *:before,
503.dx-widget *:after {
504 -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
505 box-sizing: border-box;
506}
507.dx-item {
508 outline: 0;
509}
510.dx-rtl {
511 direction: rtl;
512 unicode-bidi: embed;
513}
514.dx-state-disabled {
515 pointer-events: none;
516}
517.dx-draggable {
518 left: 0;
519 cursor: pointer;
520 -webkit-user-select: none;
521 -moz-user-select: none;
522 -ms-user-select: none;
523 user-select: none;
524 -webkit-touch-callout: none;
525}
526.dx-draggable.dx-state-disabled,
527.dx-state-disabled .dx-draggable {
528 cursor: default;
529}
530.dx-draggable-clone {
531 position: absolute;
532 top: 0;
533 left: 0;
534 z-index: 10000;
535}
536.dx-sortable {
537 overflow: hidden;
538 cursor: pointer;
539 -webkit-user-select: none;
540 -moz-user-select: none;
541 -ms-user-select: none;
542 user-select: none;
543 -webkit-touch-callout: none;
544}
545.dx-sortable.dx-state-disabled,
546.dx-state-disabled .dx-sortable {
547 cursor: default;
548}
549.dx-sortable-dragging.dx-sortable-clone {
550 position: absolute;
551 top: 0;
552 left: 0;
553 -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
554 box-sizing: border-box;
555 opacity: 0.9;
556 z-index: 10000;
557}
558.dx-sortable-source {
559 opacity: 0.5;
560}
561.dx-sortable-source-hidden {
562 opacity: 0;
563}
564.dx-sortable-placeholder {
565 position: absolute;
566 top: 0;
567 left: 0;
568 border: 1px solid transparent;
569 -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
570 box-sizing: border-box;
571 z-index: 10000;
572}
573.dx-sortable-placeholder-inside {
574 border-width: 2px;
575}
576.dx-resizable {
577 display: block;
578 position: relative;
579}
580.dx-resizable-handle {
581 position: absolute;
582 z-index: 50;
583}
584.dx-state-disabled .dx-resizable-handle {
585 cursor: default;
586}
587.dx-resizable-handle-left,
588.dx-resizable-handle-right {
589 top: 0;
590 height: 100%;
591 width: 3px;
592}
593.dx-resizable-handle-left {
594 left: 0;
595 cursor: e-resize;
596}
597.dx-resizable-handle-right {
598 right: 0;
599 cursor: e-resize;
600}
601.dx-resizable-handle-top,
602.dx-resizable-handle-bottom {
603 left: 0;
604 width: 100%;
605 height: 3px;
606}
607.dx-resizable-handle-top {
608 top: 0;
609 cursor: s-resize;
610}
611.dx-resizable-handle-bottom {
612 bottom: 0;
613 cursor: s-resize;
614}
615.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left,
616.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right,
617.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
618.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right {
619 width: 6px;
620 height: 6px;
621}
622.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
623.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right {
624 cursor: se-resize;
625}
626.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
627.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
628 cursor: ne-resize;
629}
630.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
631.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
632 left: 0;
633 border-bottom-right-radius: 100%;
634}
635.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
636.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right {
637 right: 0;
638 border-bottom-left-radius: 100%;
639}
640.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
641.dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right {
642 top: 0;
643}
644.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left,
645.dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right {
646 bottom: 0;
647}
648.dx-fieldset {
649 margin-bottom: 20px;
650}
651.dx-fieldset .dx-field-value {
652 margin: 0;
653}
654.dx-fieldset,
655.dx-fieldset * {
656 -webkit-box-sizing: border-box;
657 box-sizing: border-box;
658}
659.dx-fieldset-header:empty {
660 display: none;
661}
662.dx-field {
663 position: relative;

1381.dx-tabs-ie-hack a {
1382 position: absolute;

1384 left: 0;
1385 width: 100%;
1386 height: 100%;
1387 background-color: #fff;
1388 color: white;
1389 text-decoration: none;
1390 opacity: 0.001;

1392.dx-tabs {
1393 -webkit-user-select: none;

1395 -ms-user-select: none;

1459 position: absolute;
1460 top: 0;
1461 left: 0;

1465 color: white;
1466 text-decoration: none;

2853 display: inline-block;

2859 position: relative;

2862 position: absolute;

2865 pointer-events: none;
2866 -webkit-user-drag: none;

3169.dx-loadindicator-icon-custom {
3170 position: relative;
3171 width: 100%;

3173 background-size: 100% 100%;
3174 -webkit-transform-origin: 50% 50%;
3175 transform-origin: 50% 50%;

3177 animation: dx-loadindicator-icon-custom-rotate 1.5s infinite linear;
3178}
3179@-webkit-keyframes dx-loadindicator-icon-custom-rotate {
3180 from {
3181 -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg);
3182 transform: rotate(0deg);
3183 }
3184 to {
3185 -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
3186 transform: rotate(360deg);
3187 }
3188}

3190 from {
3191 -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg);
3192 transform: rotate(0deg);
3193 }
3194 to {
3195 -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
3196 transform: rotate(360deg);
3197 }
3198}

3645 height: 299px;

3648 background-image: linear-gradient(0deg, #ff0000 0%, #ffff00 17%, #00ff00 33%, #00ffff 50%, #0000ff 67%, #ff00ff 83%, #ff0000 100%);

7277.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-6::before {
7278 content: counter(list-6, decimal) '. ';

7280.dx-htmleditor-content li.ql-indent-6 {
7281 counter-reset: list-7 list-8 list-9;
7282}
7283.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-7 {
7284 counter-increment: list-7;
7285}
7286.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-7::before {
7287 content: counter(list-7, lower-alpha) '. ';
7288}
7289.dx-htmleditor-content li.ql-indent-7 {
7290 counter-reset: list-8 list-9;

7292.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-8 {
7293 counter-increment: list-8;
7294}
7295.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-8::before {
7296 content: counter(list-8, lower-roman) '. ';
7297}
7298.dx-htmleditor-content li.ql-indent-8 {
7299 counter-reset: list-9;
7300}
7301.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-9 {
7302 counter-increment: list-9;
7303}
7304.dx-htmleditor-content ol li.ql-indent-9::before {
7305 content: counter(list-9, decimal) '. ';

7539.dx-resize-frame {
7540 position: absolute;
7541 -webkit-box-sizing: content-box;
7542 box-sizing: content-box;
7543 border: 1px dashed lightslategrey;
7544}
7545.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7546.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
7547.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right,
7548.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7549 border: 1px solid white;
7550 width: 11px;
7551 height: 11px;
7552 border-radius: 0;
7553}
7554.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7555.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
7556.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right,
7557.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7558 width: 15px;
7559 height: 15px;
7560}
7561.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7562.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right {
7563 right: -5.5px;
7564}
7565.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7566.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right {
7567 right: -7.5px;
7568}

7570.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7571 left: -5.5px;
7572}
7573.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left,
7574.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7575 left: -7.5px;
7576}
7577.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7578.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left {
7579 top: -5.5px;
7580}
7581.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-right,
7582.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-top-left {
7583 top: -7.5px;
7584}
7585.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right,
7586.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7587 bottom: -5.5px;
7588}
7589.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-right,
7590.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-corner-bottom-left {
7591 bottom: -7.5px;
7592}
7593.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after,
7594.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after,
7595.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-top::after,
7596.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-bottom::after {
7597 content: "";
7598 position: absolute;
7599 width: 11px;
7600 height: 11px;
7601 border: 1px solid white;
7602}
7603.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after,
7604.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after,
7605.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-top::after,
7606.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-bottom::after {
7607 width: 15px;
7608 height: 15px;
7609}
7610.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after,
7611.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after {
7612 top: calc(50% - 11px / 2);
7613}
7614.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after,
7615.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after {
7616 top: calc(50% - 15px / 2);
7617}
7618.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-top::after,
7619.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-bottom::after {
7620 left: calc(50% - 11px / 2);
7621}
7622.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-top::after,
7623.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-bottom::after {
7624 left: calc(50% - 15px / 2);
7625}
7626.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after {
7627 right: -5.5px;
7628}
7629.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-right::after {
7630 right: -7.5px;
7631}
7632.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after {
7633 left: -5.5px;
7634}
7635.dx-touch-device.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-left::after {

7637}
7638.dx-resize-frame .dx-resizable-handle-top::after {
7639 top: -5.5px;
7640}

7643}

7646}

8001.dx-filemanager .dx-filemanager-i.dx-filemanager-i-progress,
8002.dx-filemanager .dx-filemanager-i.dx-icon.dx-filemanager-i-progress {
8003 -webkit-animation: dx-filemanager-icon-rotate 1.5s infinite linear;
8004 animation: dx-filemanager-icon-rotate 1.5s infinite linear;
8005}
8006@-webkit-keyframes dx-filemanager-icon-rotate {
8007 from {
8008 -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg);
8009 transform: rotate(0deg);
8010 }
8011 to {
8012 -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
8013 transform: rotate(360deg);
8014 }
8015}
8016@keyframes dx-filemanager-icon-rotate {
8017 from {
8018 -webkit-transform: rotate(0deg);
8019 transform: rotate(0deg);
8020 }
8021 to {
8022 -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
8023 transform: rotate(360deg);
8024 }
8025}

8112.dx-diagram {
8113 border: 1px solid transparent;
8114 display: -webkit-box;
8115 display: -webkit-flex;
8116 display: -ms-flexbox;
8117 display: flex;
8118 -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
8119 -webkit-box-direction: normal;
8120 -webkit-flex-flow: column;
8121 -ms-flex-flow: column;
8122 flex-flow: column;
8123 height: 400px;
8124}
8125.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-toolbar-wrapper {
8126 padding: 5px;
8127 -webkit-box-flex: 0;
8128 -webkit-flex-grow: 0;
8129 -ms-flex-positive: 0;
8130 flex-grow: 0;
8131}
8132.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-content-wrapper {
8133 display: -webkit-box;
8134 display: -webkit-flex;
8135 display: -ms-flexbox;
8136 display: flex;
8137 -webkit-box-flex: 1;
8138 -webkit-flex-grow: 1;
8139 -ms-flex-positive: 1;
8140 flex-grow: 1;
8141 -webkit-flex-basis: 0;
8142 -ms-flex-preferred-size: 0;
8143 flex-basis: 0;
8144 overflow: hidden;
8145}
8146.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-left-panel {
8147 -webkit-box-flex: 240px;
8148 -webkit-flex: 240px 0 0;
8149 -ms-flex: 240px 0 0px;
8150 flex: 240px 0 0;
8151 overflow-y: auto;
8152 position: relative;
8153 border-right: 1px solid transparent;
8154}
8155.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-left-panel > * {
8156 position: absolute;
8157}
8158.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-left-panel > .dx-scrollview {
8159 width: 100%;
8160}
8161.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-drawer-wrapper {
8162 -webkit-box-flex: 1;
8163 -webkit-flex: 1 0;
8164 -ms-flex: 1 0;
8165 flex: 1 0;
8166 overflow: hidden;
8167 -webkit-flex-basis: 0;
8168 -ms-flex-preferred-size: 0;
8169 flex-basis: 0;
8170}
8171.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-content {
8172 height: 100%;
8173}
8174.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-right-panel {
8175 border-left: 1px solid transparent;
8176}
8177.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-right-panel .dx-scrollview {
8178 width: 280px;
8179}
8180.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-right-panel .dx-accordion {
8181 width: 100%;
8182}
8183.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-toolbar-separator {
8184 height: 100%;
8185 border-left: 1px solid transparent;
8186}
8187.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-toolbar-menu-separator {
8188 width: 100%;
8189 border-top: 1px solid transparent;
8190}
8191.dx-diagram .dx-diagram-toolbar-menu-separator::before {
8192 content: none;
8193}
8194.dx-diagram.dx-diagram-fullscreen {
8195 left: 0;
8196 top: 0;
8197 width: 100% !important;
8198 height: 100% !important;
8199 position: fixed;
8200 z-index: 2;
8201}
8202.dx-diagram .dxdi-canvas {
8203 overflow: hidden;
8204}

8206.dx-dropdownmenu-popup .dx-diagram-select-b .dx-texteditor,
8207.dx-diagram-toolbar .dx-diagram-color-b .dx-texteditor,
8208.dx-dropdownmenu-popup .dx-diagram-color-b .dx-texteditor {

8229}

8237.dx-dropdownmenu-popup .dx-diagram-select-b .dx-dropdowneditor-field-template-wrapper .dx-textbox .dx-texteditor-input,

8241 padding-left: 0;
8242}
8243.dx-diagram-i {
8244 background-repeat: no-repeat;
8245 background-position: 0 0;
8246 display: inline-block;
8247}
8248.dx-diagram-loading-indicator {
8249 position: absolute;
8250 top: calc(50% - 32px);
8251 left: calc(50% - 32px);
8252 width: 64px;
8253 height: 64px;
8254}
8255.dx-diagram-touchbar.dx-context-menu .dx-menu-items-container {
8256 display: block;
8257 height: 100%;
8258 padding: 0;
8259}
8260.dx-diagram-touchbar.dx-context-menu .dx-menu-items-container::after {
8261 display: block;
8262 content: "";
8263 clear: both;
8264}
8265.dx-diagram-touchbar.dx-context-menu .dx-menu-items-container > li {
8266 display: block;
8267 float: left;
8268}
8269.dx-diagram-touchbar.dx-context-menu .dx-menu-item.dx-menu-item-has-text.dx-menu-item-has-icon .dx-menu-item-content .dx-icon {
8270 margin: 0;
8271}
8272.dx-diagram-touchbar.dx-context-menu .dx-menu-item .dx-menu-item-content .dx-menu-item-text {
8273 display: none;
8274}
8275.dx-diagram-touchbar-target {
8276 position: absolute;
8277 background-color: transparent;
8278 pointer-events: none;
8279}

8282 display: -webkit-flex;

8284 display: flex;

8301 border-top: none;

8305}

8320 width: 100%;
8321 height: 100%;
8322 position: relative;
8323}
8324.dx-deferrendering.dx-pending-rendering .dx-invisible-while-pending-rendering {
8325 display: none !important;

8327.dx-deferrendering:not(.dx-pending-rendering) .dx-visible-while-pending-rendering {
